label: ILC1
match_rationale: ILC1 in Gopee 2024 corresponds to ILC1/3 in Reynolds 2021, reflecting ILC1-ILC3 plasticity. CL:0001077 (ILC1, human) is the best match for the ILC1 component, though the ILC1/3 combined annotation also includes ILC3 features. Classified as broad to reflect this mixed identity.
